3291500.name: Burger Riot
3291500.description:
Welcome to Burger Riot, the fast-paced online cooking game where running a restaurant feels more like running a circus.

You and your friends are the staff of a brand-new burger joint. Fulfill random orders to make money, pay off your loan, and (hopefully) build your burger empire. But ingredients have a mind of their own, and teamwork? Well… that depends on your crew. (Good luck getting Jeremy not to troll.)

Your restaurant is split into three chaotic rooms, each with a critical role:

  • Orders – Catch incoming requests and fire them through the tubes.

  • Ingredients – Prep and pass food like you’re in a basketball game.

  • Cooking – Grill, flip, and pray it doesn’t all catch fire.

Stay on top of your role—or abandon it to bail your friends out (or make things worse). Just remember: as the kitchen wears down, things start to break. Burgers bounce, buns fly, and every order feels like a buzzer-beater shot.

Work together (or at least try to), pass food between rooms, and see if your team can actually keep up with the madness.

Because in Burger Riot, you’re not just making burgers... you’re surviving them.
